caption: A scene takes place in a room with wood-paneled walls and a raised platform. A man in a white shirt and dark vest stands at a podium on the right, while another man in a light-colored shirt stands at a separate podium on the left. Facing them is an audience seen from behind. The audience includes a man in a grey patterned jacket and several women, one wearing a blue patterned shawl and another in a yellow top. To the right of the audience, the text "ORCA" is displayed in a white box. Across the frames, the scene remains static; the people maintain their positions and postures, with very little visible movement between the shots. The lighting and composition are consistent, capturing a formal gathering or presentation.
